texto: The rage for swiftness which is so characteristic of this restless time has been extended to fashions of reading. One effect of the modern habit of swift and careless reading is seen in the impatience with which anything is regarded which is not to be taken in at a glance.
explicacao: Citação de Arlo Bates sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “The rage for swiftness which is so characteristic of this restless time has been extended to fash…” articula reflexao, reading, which em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como termino e reflexao.
